issues.description: Extraneous third effect with trigger 'Trigger' and HasCardOnBoard condition is not present in card text. Card only describes an Activate: Main ability with reveal condition; no automatic play effect exists.
RevealFromHand should be a condition, not an action. The reveal is a cost/requirement for the ability, not an effect. Structure should use condition check before thenActions.
Missing condition object. Should have condition checking 'Can reveal 3 Amazon Lily cards from hand' before executing AttachDon action.

Scope 'AllOwnCharactersAndLeader' includes Leader implicitly. Card text says 'your Leader and all of your Characters' which is correctly interpreted, but verify consistency with DSL standard naming conventions.
